raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.2":"Logical consistency is a central expected responsibility in improving a research draft to ensure the argument chain holds without contradictions.","R1.3":"Evidence-claim alignment is central as improving the draft involves verifying that reported results support the stated claims.","R1.5":"Structural reorganization is central for enhancing the overall narrative arc and section flow in the draft.","R1.6":"Writing polish is load-bearing since sentence-level improvements in grammar, flow, and conciseness are fundamental to draft enhancement.","R1.7":"Citation and scholarship is central to improve reference accuracy and literature coverage in the technical draft.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is central to responsibly improve the draft by highlighting any limitations or variabilities in the claims.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration of contributions or results, which would invalidate the improved draft.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is central to ensure the improvements stay within the topic of time-series forecasting without unwarranted expansions.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral for this benign forecasting topic but included to mitigate any potential misuse risks.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is central to verify the origins of benchmarks and prior works mentioned in the draft."}}

rationale.R1.2: Logical consistency is a central expected responsibility in improving a research draft to ensure the argument chain holds without contradictions.
rationale.R1.3: Evidence-claim alignment is central as improving the draft involves verifying that reported results support the stated claims.
rationale.R1.5: Structural reorganization is central for enhancing the overall narrative arc and section flow in the draft.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is load-bearing since sentence-level improvements in grammar, flow, and conciseness are fundamental to draft enhancement.
rationale.R1.7: Citation and scholarship is central to improve reference accuracy and literature coverage in the technical draft.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is central to responsibly improve the draft by highlighting any limitations or variabilities in the claims.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration of contributions or results, which would invalidate the improved draft.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is central to ensure the improvements stay within the topic of time-series forecasting without unwarranted expansions.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral for this benign forecasting topic but included to mitigate any potential misuse risks.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is central to verify the origins of benchmarks and prior works mentioned in the draft.
